description_long: This is a rectangular carton of Faragello strawberry flavored milk, featuring a vibrant red background and playful graphics. The front displays a cartoon lion mascot dressed as a superhero, with a splash of milk and a large strawberry illustration, emphasizing the flavor. The packaging includes both English and Arabic text, with nutritional highlights such as calcium, vitamin D, iron, and zinc prominently displayed. The sides of the carton provide detailed nutritional information, ingredients, and branding, with one side showing a QR code and social media icons. The top of the carton is sealed and features the Faragello logo. The overall design is colorful and appealing, targeting children and families.
description: A red rectangular carton of Faragello strawberry flavored milk with a cartoon lion mascot, strawberry graphics, and bilingual text. Nutritional highlights and branding are clearly visible.
description_view_0: Front view shows the Faragello logo, cartoon lion mascot, strawberry and milk splash graphics, and key nutritional highlights in English.
description_view_1: Side view displays product information and ingredients in Arabic, with less prominent graphics.
description_view_2: Alternate front view with similar graphics as view 0, but all text is in Arabic.
description_view_3: Opposite side view features nutritional facts, a QR code, and social media icons, with less graphic emphasis.
attribute_brand_logo: The Faragello brand logo is visible on the top front of the carton, featuring white stylized text on a red background with a white swoosh above the name.
attribute_flavor_indication: Strawberry flavor is indicated by the word 'strawberry', a large strawberry graphic, and a pink-red color scheme.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Nutritional information is present on the side of the carton, including a nutrition facts panel, ingredient list, and highlighted nutrients (calcium, vitamin D, iron, zinc) on the front.
attribute_promotional_graphics: A cartoon lion mascot dressed as a superhero is prominently displayed on the front, serving as a promotional graphic to attract children.
